description:
Provides a visual threshold-triggering feature for Radial Puppet menu items
Automatically executes the corresponding action when the parameter value falls within a specified range
default_value_tooltip: Initial radial parameter value when avatar loads
preview_help: Temporarily applies the rules matched by the current Default Value so you can see the avatar load state in edit mode. The original state is restored when preview is disabled or selection changes.
warn_not_radial: The MA Menu Item on this object is not a Radial Puppet. This component will have no effect
warn_parent_not_radial: The parent MA Menu Item is not a Radial Puppet. This component will have no effect
error_no_menu_item:
No MA Menu Item found.
Place this component on the same object as, or as a child of, an MA Menu Item (Radial Puppet)
